text:
The [applicant] / [respondent] / [intervener] / [second respondent] shall by [time and date] file with the court and serve on the other parties [points of dispute] / [a defence] [setting out [his] / [her] / [their] case in reply].

The [applicant] / [respondent] / [intervener] / [second respondent] shall by [time and date] file with the court and serve on the other parties any witness statements upon which [he] / [she] / [they] intend to rely. Such statements must comply with paragraph 80 of the Financial Remedies Guide of 13 March 2026.

There be the following additional directions for disclosure:

[insert].

Documents to be produced by trustees

The [second] / [third] / [etc. as appropriate] respondent shall by [time and date] file with the court and serve on the applicant and the first respondent the following information and documents in respect of the [insert] settlement:

copies of the deed of trust and all subsequent deeds of variation and appointment;

copies of the completed and approved trust accounts for the last [number] years;

[copies of any letter of wishes;]

confirmation as to the identity of the present trustees [and protector] of the trust;

confirmation as to the identity of the present beneficiaries of the trust;

a schedule authenticated by the trustees setting out all distributions and appointments made to or on behalf of the [applicant] / [first respondent] / [insert other] since [date]; and

a short narrative statement setting out the trustees’ anticipated position in respect of any further distributions to or on behalf of the [applicant] / [first respondent] / [insert as appropriate].

Single Joint Expert Reports

General Provisions

The parties shall agree the identity of any single joint expert. In default of agreement by [time and date], the [applicant] / [respondent] shall provide the [respondent] / [applicant] with a list of three appropriate experts by [time and date] and the [respondent] / [applicant] shall select an expert from the list by [time and date].

The letter of instruction shall be drafted by the [applicant] / [respondent] and agreed with the [respondent] / [applicant] by [time and date].

The letter of instruction shall be sent to the expert by [time and date].

metadata.source: Standard Family Orders — Volume 1: Financial Remedies (May 2026)
metadata.title: In the Family Court		Case No: [Case number]
